name: Scene Setup
description: Create a Unity XR workspace, configure OpenXR support, and import optimized heritage assets into the scene.

steps.title: Generate the XR Workspace and Unity Project
steps.description: Create the workspace structure for the XR project and initialize the Unity project using Unity Hub.
instructions: Use the Generate Project Structure button to create the workspace folder hierarchy for the XR project.
Select the final workspace root folder where all project data will be stored.
The application automatically generates folders for workflow data, Unity assets, textures, exports, documentation, and references.
After the workspace is created, launch Unity Hub using the Launch Unity button.
Inside Unity Hub, create a new 3D project and set the project location to the generated UnityProject folder inside the workspace directory.
Once the project opens in Unity, install the XR Interaction Toolkit using the Unity Package Manager.
Enable the OpenXR plugin inside Project Settings > XR Plug-in Management.
Configure the target platform for standalone VR deployment if using Meta Quest or similar devices.
Verify that the Unity project opens successfully before continuing.
checklist: Unity project created inside UnityProject folder

steps.title: Import Optimized Assets into Unity
steps.description: Transfer optimized monument assets into the Unity project and prepare them for scene placement.
instructions: Use the Copy Workflow Assets button to copy optimized FBX meshes and textures into both the workflow folders and the Unity Assets/Imported directory.
When prompted, select the optimized texture folder exported from Blender.
Next, select the optimized FBX export folder generated during the Blender optimization stage.
The application automatically copies these assets into the Unity project import directory.
Return to Unity and allow the editor to finish importing the copied assets.
Drag the optimized FBX monument asset into the scene hierarchy.
Verify the object scale and orientation after import.
Generate colliders for walkable or interactive surfaces where appropriate.
Organize imported assets into folders inside the Unity project for easier scene management.

steps.title: Configure XR Scene Lighting and Environment
steps.description: Prepare scene lighting and rendering settings suitable for immersive XR heritage experiences.
instructions: Add a directional light to simulate natural sunlight for outdoor heritage environments.
Configure ambient lighting or a skybox to improve scene depth and environmental realism.
Avoid excessive real-time lights to maintain stable VR performance on standalone XR hardware.
Use baked lighting for static environments whenever possible to improve rendering efficiency.
Review shadows and lighting quality from the player's expected viewing angles inside VR.
Adjust light intensity and color temperature to preserve monument visibility without overexposure.
Test the scene inside the XR preview mode to ensure the environment remains comfortable and visually stable.
